title: Blunderbombs
description:
Bring the chaos of Blunderbombs from Sea of Thieves into Minecraft

Comes in both damaging and non-damaging variants!
body:
# Blunderbombs, in Minecraft!

Have your ever wanted to Blunderbomb your crewmates beyond the Shroud?

The **_Blunderbombs_** mod adds Sea-of-Thieves-inspired chaotic throwables to Minecraft. Upon hitting something, they emit a painful shockwave that sends nearby players and mobs flying!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LoVmCCU4KgU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Description

The mod provides two craftable items: a "Blunderbomb" (painful shockwave) and "Blunderwhiff" (harmless shockwave). The knockback from both can be countered effectively with Blast Protection.

### The Blunderbomb

A _Blunderbomb_ deals 1-3 hearts of explosive damage to all nearby players and mobs, depending on how close they are to the blast. On a direct hit, up to 5 total hearts of damage will be dealt (the remainder is dealt as projectile damage).

A modest shockwave will also send players, mobs, and other entities flying! You may find some unexpected uses for this, perhaps?

![Blunderbomb Crafting Recipe consisting of 3 Gunpowder along the bottom, and then alternating iron nugget, glass bottle, iron nugget above that line](https://i.imgur.com/zzrWjMU.png)

### The Blunderwhiff (Harmless Blunderbomb)

The _Blunderwhiff_ deals no damage, but will still knock back entities with a modest shockwave. Unlike a _Blunderbomb_ through, the knockback will not apply to the player that throws it.

On friendly community servers, you may wish to disable the _Blunderbomb_ recipe and leave only _Blunderwhiff_ as craftable — this is still plenty of fun, but remember fall damage still exists!

![Blunderbomb Crafting Recipe consisting of 3 Gunpowder along the bottom, and then alternating feather, glass bottle, feather above that line](https://i.imgur.com/0CueMi0.png)

## Installation

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is required
- Install like any other Fabric mod

## Roadmap & Help Needed

- [Translations](https://github.com/loonietoque/blunderbombs-mod/issues/1) (I need help with this! Please see [here](https://github.com/loonietoque/blunderbombs-mod/issues/1) if you'd like to help!)
- Ability to launch Blunderbombs from Dispensers
- Better, more immersive sounds
- Better custom particles
- Act as dynamic light source

## FAQ

**_Will you add Firebombs?_**

I'm undecided! [Express your interest](https://github.com/loonietoque/blunderbombs-mod/issues/2) in this issue on GitHub if you'd like to see this, or join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/5Wxr2bjAVH) and let us know there!

**_Can I use this in my modpack?_**

Currently, no. However, open-source versions of this mod will be permitted in modpacks! This project aims to be open-sourced by the end of 2023.

**_Can you add Dispenser functionality for traps?_**

Absolutely! This is a planned feature for the open-source release by the end of 2023.

**_Can you backport to <Minecraft version>?_**

While I aim to support future Minecraft versions, it's hard to justify supporting much older ones. I can be convinced but there's no promises, sorry.


## Disclaimers

This fan project was made with love by LoonieToque, but not in affiliation with _Sea of Thieves_, _Rare Ltd._, or _Microsoft_. The _Sea of Thieves_ and _Blunderbomb_ names belong to _Rare Ltd._
